strengths: The agent was able to confirm that the card was sent and was aware of the card system's status.
The agent provided some general information about the card arrival process.
The agent was able to escalate the issue to a supervisor.
improvements: The agent needs to improve their communication skills to be more empathetic and understanding towards customers.
The agent should provide clear and concise information about the estimated delivery timeframe and offer assistance with tracking or replacement.
The agent should be more proactive in offering solutions and alternatives to resolve the customer's issue.

rephrasing.original: The card system showed it sent.
rephrasing.better: I've checked our system, and it shows that your card was sent on [date]. I can provide you with an estimated delivery timeframe of [timeframe]. Would you like me to assist you with tracking the package?

rephrasing.original: It's not our problem, and the card will come when it comes.
rephrasing.better: I understand that you're concerned about the delay. I want to assure you that we're doing our best to get your card to you as soon as possible. If you'd like, I can offer to assist you with tracking the package or provide information on how to track it yourself.

I understand that you're concerned about the delay. In the meantime, I can offer to assist you with tracking the package or provide information on how to track it yourself. If you'd like, I can also offer to replace the card once it's officially lost. Let me know how I can further assist you.

I understand that you're frustrated with the delay. I want to assure you that we're doing our best to get your card to you as soon as possible. Can I offer you any assistance or alternatives to resolve your issue?
